description: API performance metrics for the Clario 360 platform — request rates, latencies, error rates, circuit breakers, and upstream health.

targets.expr: sum by (service) (rate(clario360_gateway_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service=~"$service", status_code=~"5.."}[$interval])) / sum by (service) (rate(clario360_gateway_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service=~"$service"}[$interval]))
topk(20, sum by (service, method, path) (rate(clario360_gateway_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service=~"$service"}[$interval])))

topk(20, sum by (service, method, path) (rate(clario360_gateway_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service=~"$service", status_code=~"[45].."}[$interval])) / sum by (service, method, path) (rate(clario360_gateway_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service=~"$service"}[$interval])))

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: api-gateway, iam-service, audit-service, workflow-engine, notification-service, file-service, cyber-service, data-service, acta-service, lex-service, visus-service

title: Clario 360 — API Performance
